_comment: Hybrid Red Pen — decorrelated, no Google free tier. Claude proposes (local CLI); Gemini attacks via OpenRouter (reliable, sidesteps the dead free Gemini-CLI tier); Codex attacks via local CLI. Needs OPENROUTER_API_KEY (https://openrouter.ai/keys) for the Gemini adversary only; claude + codex stay local as before. The Gemini model is google/gemini-3.5-flash (confirmed-valid OpenRouter id, near-Pro reasoning, reliable). Swap for any current id at https://openrouter.ai/models — pick the literal id from a model's page; alias slugs like *-pro-latest are NOT valid here. Run: node orchestrate.mjs --task "..." --config agents.redpen.hybrid.json --rounds 5

proposer.name: Claude (proposer)
proposer.system: You are a careful, concrete builder. Produce strong, complete work and improve it honestly when the Red Pen lands a real attack — but do not over-correct for objections in the noise band.
